top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) 
FROM atom 
WHERE element = 'Cl' 
AND molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'C' 
    AND molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id 
        FROM atom 
        WHERE element = 'O' 
        OR element = 'N' 
        OR element = 'S' 
        OR element = 'P'
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id)
FROM atom a
WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
AND a.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a1 ON m.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
    WHERE a1.element = 'C'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a2.molecule_id
        FROM atom a2
        WHERE a2.element IN ('O', 'N', 'S', 'P')
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT molecule_id) 
FROM atom 
WHERE element = 'Cl' 
AND molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT molecule_id 
    FROM atom 
    WHERE element = 'C' 
    AND molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id 
        FROM atom 
        WHERE element = 'O' 
        OR element = 'N' 
        OR element = 'S' 
        OR element = 'P'
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.molecule_id)
FROM atom a
WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
AND a.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT m.molecule_id
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a1 ON m.molecule_id = a1.molecule_id
    WHERE a1.element = 'C'
    AND m.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a2.molecule_id
        FROM atom a2
        WHERE a2.element IN ('O', 'N', 'S', 'P')
    )
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT a2.molecule_id
    FROM atom a2
    WHERE a2.element = 'C'
    AND a2.molecule_id IN (
        SELECT a3.molecule_id
        FROM atom a3
        WHERE a3.element IN ('O', 'N', 'S', 'P')
    )
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.molecule_id 
    FROM atom a 
    WHERE a.element = 'Cl'
);
